text:
Once upon a time, a girl named Cathy loved collecting rare birds. She lived on a farm far north-west.

One morning she saw a bird she'd never seen before. It had blue feathers and a crest on its head.

So she took it home. Cathy named it Olive. They became best friends.

Late autumn. Olive flew low over lake water.

She flew right INTO rain.

Cathy cried.

Olive couldn't fly.

She couldn't fly back.

Cathy never hurt an animal again.

They flew south.
